title: Responsive Footer

statement.markdown:
### Description
Create a responsive footer that adapts to different screen sizes.
### Requirements
1. The footer should have a maximum width of 1200px.
2. It should be centered horizontally on large screens and take up the full width on smaller screens.
3. Include 3 columns, each with an icon and a heading.
4. The icons should be of different sizes.
5. The headings should be of different font sizes.
### Example
![responsive-footer](https://i.imgur.com/jK1h0Qx.png)

constraints: The solution must use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The solution must be responsive and adapt to different screen sizes.
The solution must be written in HTML and CSS.

starterCode.html:
index.html: {"content":"<!-- Starter HTML for the Responsive Footer Challenge -->
","structure":["<!DOCTYPE html>
","<html lang='en'>
","<head>
","  <meta charset='UTF-8'>
","  <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0'>
","  <title>Responsive Footer</title>
","</head>
","<body>
","  <footer class='bg-gray-200 p-4 text-center'>
","    <!-- Footer content will go here -->
","  </footer>
","</body>
","</html>
"]}

gradingCriteria.description: Footer is responsive and adapts to different screen sizes.
Footer has a maximum width of 1200px.
Footer is centered horizontally on large screens and takes up the full width on smaller screens.
Footer has 3 columns, each with an icon and a heading.
